---
title: "Resume"
author: Kyle Tolliver
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
params:
  pdf_mode:
    value: true
  cache_data:
    value: true
output: 
  pagedown::html_resume:
    css: ['resume.css', 'resume']
    self_contained: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("../scripts/site.R")
datpath <- "../data/"
load_libraries()
file <- 'resume'
```

Aside
====================================

Contact Info {#contact}
------------------------------------

```{r contact}
print_contact(file)
```

Skills {#skills}
------------------------------------

```{r skill}
print_skills()
```

Disclaimer {#disclaimer}
------------------------------------

`r print_disclaimer()`

Main
====================================

Kyle Tolliver {#title}
------------------------------------

Education {data-icon=graduation-cap}
------------------------------------

`r print_resume_education()`

Experience {data-icon=briefcase}
------------------------------------

```{r}
print_resume_section('experience')
```

Projects {data-icon=laptop}
------------------------------------

```{r}
print_resume_section('projects')
```
